title: Manufacturing Engineer - Orient Electric - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Orient Electric - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!
